tasks.title: Verify defaultModel settings support for non-Claude providers
tasks.notes: Code analysis findings — CLI testing not possible on PM machine (no Gemini/Codex CLIs). | Provider | Config key | Honors it? | Notes | |---------|------------|-----------|-------| | Claude | model in ~/.claude/settings.json | Yes | Confirmed per PLAN.md | | Gemini | None found | Not verifiable | No defaultModel config key in Gemini provider code; buildPromptCommand already supports --model flag | | Codex | None found | Not verifiable | No defaultModel config key in Codex provider code; buildPromptCommand already supports --model flag | CONCLUSION: Task 2 should inject --model <standard> via existing model param in buildPromptCommand for all providers.

tasks.title: Resolve standard tier model when model param is omitted
tasks.notes: Added resolvedModel = input.model ?? provider.modelTiers().standard in executePrompt(). Used resolvedModel in main command and both retry commands.

tasks.title: Update executePromptSchema model param description
tasks.notes: Updated model param description to document standard-tier default with provider-specific examples.

tasks.title: Add tests for default model tier resolution
tasks.notes: Added two tests: (a) omitting model param results in claude-sonnet-4-6 in command, (b) explicit model param passed through unchanged without standard tier override.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 1
tasks.notes: 589 tests passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed. tsc clean (no explicit check run but all tests import TS and pass). Phase 1 changes: standard tier defaulting in executePrompt, schema description updated, two new tests all green.

tasks.title: Write defaultModel: standard to settings during install
tasks.notes: Added PROVIDER_STANDARD_MODELS map and writeDefaultModel() in install.ts. Called after configureStatusline() so the defaultModel key is written to each provider's settings file using the correct standard-tier model name per provider (claude-sonnet-4-6, gemini-2.5-pro, gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-5).

tasks.title: Add install tests for defaultModel
tasks.notes: Added 4 new tests to tests/install-multi-provider.test.ts: one per provider (claude, gemini, codex, copilot). Each test asserts that the post-install settings file contains the correct defaultModel value. All 19 install tests pass (15 existing + 4 new).

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: 593 tests passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed across 37 test files. Phase 2 changes: writeDefaultModel() added to install.ts writes standard-tier model name to each provider's settings file during install; 4 new install tests verify defaultModel for all 4 providers (claude-sonnet-4-6, gemini-2.5-pro, gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-5). All green.

tasks.title: Add usage field to ParsedResponse interface
tasks.notes: Added usage?: { input_tokens: number; output_tokens: number } to ParsedResponse interface in provider.ts. Updated all four providers (claude, gemini, codex, copilot) parseResponse() to return usage: undefined. TypeScript compiles clean.

tasks.title: Extract Claude token counts from JSON response
tasks.notes: Updated claude.ts parseResponse() to extract parsed.usage.input_tokens and parsed.usage.output_tokens when both are numbers; returns undefined otherwise. Added 3 unit tests: usage present → tokens returned, usage absent → undefined, non-JSON → undefined. 99 provider tests pass.

tasks.title: Surface token counts in execute_prompt output
tasks.notes: Added token line append in executePrompt() after parsing: if parsed.usage defined, appends \nTokens: input=N output=M to output. Two integration tests added: usage present → token line appears, usage absent → no token line. 12 execute-prompt tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 3
tasks.notes: 598 tests passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed across 37 test files. Phase 3 changes: usage field added to ParsedResponse interface; all 4 providers return usage: undefined in parseResponse(); claude.ts extracts input_tokens/output_tokens from parsed.usage when present; executePrompt() appends Tokens: input=N output=M line when usage is defined. 3 new Claude provider unit tests + 2 new execute-prompt integration tests all green.

tasks.title: Add token and tier fields to tpl-progress.json schema
tasks.notes: Added tokens: {doer:{input:0,output:0},reviewer:{input:0,output:0}} to both work and verify task entries; added tier: 'standard' to work task entry only. Valid JSON confirmed.

tasks.title: Create src/tools/update-task-tokens.ts MCP tool
tasks.notes: Created update_task_tokens tool: reads progress.json via cat on member, accumulates tokens on PM side, pushes back via send_files, commits on member. Registered in src/index.ts. 6 integration tests: doer accumulation, reviewer accumulation, multi-cycle reviewer accumulation (never overwrites), missing tokens init, cat failure, unknown task_id. All 604 tests pass.

tasks.title: Document token update workflow in PM skill
tasks.notes: Added 'Post-dispatch Token Tracking' section to doer-reviewer.md: regex Tokens: input=(\d+) output=(\d+), call update_task_tokens after every dispatch (doer or reviewer), skip only when token line absent (non-Claude provider).

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 4
Replace opus-specific references with standard/premium tier language
Update planning prompt with model tier assignment step
Update user-facing docs to remove Opus branding
Document resume=true rule for follow-up dispatches in PM skill
VERIFY Phase 5
